lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: Hello, welcome to Morytania!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another set of Morytania legs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: My name is Le Sabre and I'm the task master for the Morytania Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. Here in Morytania it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: Well, there are four different pairs of Morytania platelegs, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: rewards would you like to know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Morytania, your legs can teleport to the Slime pit beneath the Ectofuntus twice a day, there's a chance Ghasts will ignore you in the swamp, and you'll receive a 2.5%

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, you get 5 daily slime pit teleports and a built-in ghostspeak amulet. Robin in Port Phasmatys will exchange some bonemeal for bones for you, and you'll receive a 5% increase in Slayer

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you can pick double Mort Myre Fungi in the swamp, get more experience from burning shades, receive more runes from Barrows, Robin will exchange more bonemeal for

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: bones each day and you'll receive a 7.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower. The disciples at the Ectofuntus will give you a bonecrusher too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, Robin will exchange even more bonemeal for bones, you'll receive a 10% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower, there's a new herb farming patch on

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: Harmony Island, you'll receive 50% more experience when cremating shade remains and the experience provided by the Bonecrusher is increased too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in Morytania so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: See you later!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Morytania Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: These platelegs are a symbol of your exploration of Morytania. You can use them to teleport to the Slime pit beneath the Ectofuntus twice a day, there's a chance Ghasts will ignore you in the swamp, and you'll receive

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: a 2.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: If you ever lose them, come back to me to reclaim them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. They've now got 5 daily slime pit teleports and a built-in ghostspeak amulet. Robin in Port Phasmatys will exchange some bonemeal for bones for you, and you'll

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: receive a 5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. You can now pick double Mort Myre Fungi in the swamp, get more experience from burning shades, receive more runes from Barrows, Robin will exchange more

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: bonemeal for bones each day and you'll receive a 7.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower. The disciples at the Ectofuntus have something for you too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Morytania! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. Robin will exchange even more bonemeal for bones, you'll receive a 10% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower, there's a new herb farming patch on

lines.speaker: Le-sabrè
lines.text: Harmony Island, you'll receive 50% more experience when cremating shade remains and the experience provided by the Bonecrusher has been increased too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
